verdict: SUCCESS: the two transverse Goldstone modes are degenerate (mean split 0.04) and spatially isotropic (direction CV 0.04); they form a clean equivalent pair of scalar Goldstones. The transverse static structure factor falls as S(k)~k^-0.58 over the limited probed range (6 k-points): softer than mean-field flat (0) but not yet the relativistic 1/k (-1); reported as a diagnostic, not over-interpreted at this size/range.
